pi_items.source: Explicit requirement in task description and target for export script.
Explicit requirement in task description, matches the provided AAPL.Last.txt historical data.
Python simulation of SampleMACrossover(10,25) using the provided AAPL.Last.txt dataset yields ~10 daily trades, confirming the 5-30 tolerance bounds enforced by verifier.py are correct.
Python simulation of SampleMACrossover(10,25) using the provided AAPL.Last.txt dataset yields ~10 daily trades, confirming the 5-30 tolerance bounds enforced by verifier.py are correct.
Python simulation of SampleMACrossover(10,25) using weekly resampled AAPL.Last.txt yields ~2 weekly trades, confirming the 0-10 tolerance bounds enforced by verifier.py are correct.
Python simulation of SampleMACrossover(10,25) using weekly resampled AAPL.Last.txt yields ~2 weekly trades, confirming the 0-10 tolerance bounds enforced by verifier.py are correct.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real-world Yahoo Finance historical data for AAPL to evaluate trade frequencies for the SampleMACrossover(10, 25) strategy. A pandas simulation confirms that approximately 10 daily trades and 2 weekly trades occur during 2024, validating that the 5-30 daily and 0-10 weekly tolerance bounds defined in the metadata and verifier.py are correctly calibrated. However, this task is severely defective. The task definition requires 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' to run as pre_task and post_task hooks respectively, but both files are entirely missing from the environment. Because 'export_result.ps1' is missing, the expected 'C:\tmp\task_result.json' is never generated, causing the Python verifier to perpetually fail and returning an unscorable result for any agent.
